_instructions: Copy this file to eval_set.json and replace with real questions from YOUR ingested documents. For each question: (1) pick a fact that appears in exactly one source file, (2) note that filename as expected_source, (3) write the correct answer as reference_answer. Aim for 15-30 questions covering different files/sections for a meaningful sample.

questions.question: What is the return policy time window mentioned in the handbook?
questions.reference_answer: Items can be returned within 30 days of purchase with a valid receipt.

questions.question: Who is the point of contact for IT support requests?
questions.reference_answer: IT support requests should be sent to the helpdesk email listed in the onboarding guide.
